content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the pending force-complete proposal threshold leak in src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs. The force-completed propose_new_bead follow-up path now passes at least the configured parsimonious proposal threshold into handle_propose_new_bead, so an accepted single-reviewer deferral cannot be left pending solely because reviewer count is below the normal proposal threshold. This keeps the existing handle_propose_new_bead duplicate, active-bead, existing-open-bead, journal replay, dependency repair, and br mutation safeguards intact. The mixed force-complete regression now uses a single reviewer and asserts that a created event is recorded with the configured threshold and no propose_new_bead_pending event is emitted.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspected the terminal review reconciliation path, the force-completed propose_new_bead follow-up helper, and the existing mixed-classification regression coverage.
2. [Completed] Adjusted the force-completed follow-up creation path to satisfy the configured proposal threshold before calling handle_propose_new_bead, preserving existing duplicate and existing-bead checks inside that handler.
3. [Completed] Updated the force-completed mixed deferral regression so the accepted proposal has only one reviewer source and verified it creates a follow-up bead instead of a pending event.
4. [Completed] Ran targeted and full validation gates required by the contract.

## Validation Evidence

- nix develop --command cargo test --features test-stub --locked force_completed_mixed_deferrals_create_single_reviewer_propose_new_bead_followups -- --nocapture passed.
- nix develop --command cargo fmt --check passed.
- nix develop --command cargo test --features test-stub --locked passed: 1346 lib tests, 379 CLI tests, 1 run_attach_tmux test, 1130 unit tests, and doctests all passed with expected ignored tests.
- nix develop --command cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings passed.
- nix build passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- Live .ralph-burning orchestration state remains modified in the working tree and was excluded from code review scope per the prompt.
